stories.title: US Senate confirms pro-crypto Selig to lead CFTC, Hill to head FDIC
stories.summary: The US Senate confirmed crypto-friendly lawyer Mike Selig as the new CFTC chair and elevated Travis Hill to chair the FDIC.

stories.title: Bitcoin, altcoins sell off as Fed chair switch-up, AI bubble fears spook markets
stories.summary: Crypto markets slid as traders turned risk-averse amid renewed Fed leadership speculation, tightening liquidity and broader macro uncertainty.

stories.title: Texas grid is heating up again, this time from AI, not Bitcoin miners
stories.summary: ERCOT reported a record surge in large-load requests, with AI data centers surpassing Bitcoin miners and reshaping Texas grid planning and reliability outlook.

stories.title: Crypto market sentiment stays in ‘Fear’ following Trump’s deal with China
stories.summary: A widely used crypto market sentiment indicator remained in Fear territory despite improved clarity on trade relations between the US and China.

stories.title: $19B crypto market crash was ‘controlled deleveraging,’ not cascade: Analyst
stories.summary: Analysts said the record $19 billion crypto liquidation was more organic deleveraging than a market cascade.

stories.title: Stablecoin market boom to $300B is ‘rocket fuel’ for crypto rally
stories.summary: The record $300 billion stablecoin supply may act as rocket fuel for crypto valuations while signaling deeper integration with global finance.

stories.title: Bitcoin chases new highs as crypto market cap crosses $4.21T
stories.summary: Bitcoin rallied close to $124,000 as surging US demand, shifting Federal Reserve policy and bullish Q4 hopes lifted investor sentiment.

stories.title: Crypto stocks tumble alongside BTC, equities as tariff fears resurface
stories.summary: Shares of US crypto companies fell sharply in a broader sell-off driven by weak jobs data, inflation concerns and renewed tariff threats.

stories.title: Crypto market cap nears $4T, just behind the biggest company in the world
stories.summary: Surges in Ether and XRP drove total crypto market capitalization to record highs just shy of $4 trillion.

stories.title: Montana Becomes Latest State To Ban Lab-Grown Meat
stories.summary: Montana became the fifth US state to pass legislation prohibiting lab-cultivated proteins.
